phase0_note: Bootstrap initialized the run universe; the only deviation was benign DERIVED_PARENT creation during preflight. No analysis, audit, modeling, plotting, gate judgment, M3 use, or self-review was performed.
phase1_summary: Independent plan review found five blocking issues: unfrozen confirmatory endpoint/model specification, incomplete leakage denylist, underdefined negative controls, non-falsifiable PASS/FAIL thresholds, and missing RQ009 M3-vs-M4 downstream-clearance gate. SAP v2 was revised, independently re-reviewed as PASS with 7/7 review blockers closed, and PI-accepted on 2026-06-25; the locked SAP resolves B001-B005 by specification. Phase 3 remains paused only on RQ009 Gate G1.

phase2_summary.headline: 300 outcome cells; 285 clean replay cells; full_300 - clean_285 equals T19 across 15 scenarios; 0 missing official fields; 0 duplicate keys; 28 checks and 0 FAIL.

negative_control_margins.uncertainty: paired two-way team x scenario blocked confidence interval

uncertainty.bootstrap: two-way team x scenario blocked wild cluster bootstrap

deviation_scale_floor_rad.fallback: PI freezes a documented replacement before prediction consumption

accepted_config.phase3_gate_G1: RQ009 freezes M3 AND explicitly clears downstream consumption after the M3-vs-M4 pivot

phase4_criterion_prereg.superseded_reason: Cell-level binary criterion was ill-posed for RQ011B: collision was too sparse, while any-failure was saturated at 285/285 cells. SAP v4 moves the criterion to onset-defined MOMENT/EVENT-level monitor validation.
phase4_criterion_prereg.supersede_reason: SAP v2 collision-centric primary criterion was under-powered at 19 collision events at the pre-model support check; v3 locks the PI-accepted broad interaction-failure composite plus per-category and directional endpoints.
phase4_criterion_prereg.ultimate_rq: Can IPV, one socially meaningful and interpretable indicator of deviation from the human cooperative norm, serve as a parsimonious runtime monitor of failed AV interaction behavior, with sign/direction distinguishing aggressive versus passive failure types and LOSO generalization?
phase4_criterion_prereg.primary_endpoint: any_interaction_failure = OR over 18 confirmatory included categories in interaction_failure_catalog_v5_1.csv
analysis_layers: per-category secondary analyses with fixed BH-FDR denominator m=18
directional envelope-anchored inverted-U with aggressive/passive per-tail rule

scheme_defaults.B: proximity K=5 robustness only if support passes
scheme_defaults.C: E02/E09 active K=1 descriptive where overlapping
scheme_defaults.E: peak closing/distance/decel K=1 descriptive where overlapping

gate1.bootstrap: two-way team x scenario blocked wild bootstrap, B=10000, seed=20260625

gate_defaults.gate3: LOSO 14-train/1-holdout; pass 12/15 folds for direction and positive held-out skill; single-scenario positive-skill contribution <=40%

phase4_criterion_prereg.sparse_event_tiering: >=20 events and >=20 non-events full gates; smaller class 10-19 M3-only exact/permutation or descriptive summaries; <10, all-event, or all-none no inferential claim
phase4_criterion_prereg.scheme_endpoint_rule: Exposure schemes A/B may pair with broad, per-category, and directional endpoints using exposure-conditioned language and overlap diagnostics; event/marker-conditioned schemes C/D/E are descriptive-only for overlapping endpoints/groups/composites; official-only endpoints remain allowed for all schemes.
phase4_criterion_prereg.audit_chain: v4 -> W1 pre-model support under-power (19 collisions) -> v5 broad -> review -> v5.1 -> re-review PASS -> PI accepted 2026-06-28
phase4_criterion_prereg.next_gate: superseded by moment-level monitor pre-registration; see phase5_moment_monitor_prereg

phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.supersede_reason: Cell-level binary criterion was ill-posed: collision too sparse, any-failure saturated 285/285. The locked criterion is now onset-defined MOMENT/EVENT-level monitor validation.
phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.ultimate_rq: IPV as a parsimonious interpretable directional runtime monitor of interaction failure.
phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.primary_unit: one timestamped, onset-defined failure event occurrence from the 18 confirmatory categories
phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.secondary_at_moment: closest valid scored frame <= t_fail within 0.25s; coincident descriptive context only
phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.primary_contrast: any_failure_moment vs C1 within-interaction matched controls

control_constructions.C4: seeded random non-failure controls; reproducibility sensitivity

phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.control_exclusion: all C1-C4 controls exclude every failure event interval plus guard [event_onset - 3.0s, event_resolution + 3.0s]; control scoring interval [t_control - 2.0s, t_control] must be disjoint from every forbidden interval

per_frame_defaults.IPV_removed: frozen RQ009 IPV-removed tier with counterpart-IPV channel zeroed
per_frame_defaults.build_firewall: materialize and hash per-frame deviations before reading failure timestamps or constructing controls

metrics: C2 false alarms per interaction minute

phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.directionality: aggressive -> below-norm/aggressive tail; passive -> above-norm/passive tail; severe-undirected no sign claim; sign-flip specificity required
phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.multiplicity: single primary any_failure_moment vs C1; C2-C4 cannot rescue; per-category BH-FDR denominator m=18
phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.interpretation_ceiling: interpretable runtime monitor only; no causal, planner, deployment, legal-fault, or normative-authority claims
phase5_moment_monitor_prereg.audit_chain: cell-level W1 saturation -> moment redesign -> review -> v2 -> re-review PASS -> PI accepted 2026-06-29

phase5_moment_monitor_closeout.headline: Moment-level IPV monitor validity was not demonstrated on OnSite. The result is under-identified/provisional null because the interaction-failure segment retrieval/segmentation is itself inadequate.
phase5_moment_monitor_closeout.question: Can IPV deviation from the human cooperative-norm envelope serve as a parsimonious, interpretable, directional runtime monitor of interaction failure, flagging or preceding failure moments, on OnSite competition replay?

decision_details.primary_contrast: any_failure_moment vs C1 within-interaction matched controls, onset-safe pre-window

phase5_moment_monitor_closeout.critical_caveat: The bottleneck is interaction-failure segment retrieval/segmentation. Collision-only was too sparse, broad any-failure was saturated, and moment-level within-interaction controls vanished because failure markers are too dense or ill-posed. The null is provisional and measurement-limited, not a clean refutation of IPV-based monitoring.
phase5_moment_monitor_closeout.future_pointer: A separate future RQ should study proper interaction-failure-segment retrieval/segmentation; revisit the RQ011B monitor verdict only after that measurement layer is solved.
phase5_moment_monitor_closeout.manuscript_role: No clean accepted/rejected criterion or monitor-validity claim; bounds the claim as not demonstrated on OnSite pending adequate failure-segment retrieval.

A1.title: counterpart_swap demoted to descriptive pre-W1
A1.justification: Full counterpart_swap is compute-prohibitive in the current local workflow (partial run 709.5 s/100 anchors over 35,754, approximately 40-42 h serial and likely requiring HPC) and partially redundant with the four retained structure-preserving controls.
A1.honesty_note: Decided and recorded before any W1 outcome relationship was estimated; counterpart_swap will be reported descriptively on available coverage.

phase4_interaction_conditioned_prereg.superseded_reason: Collision-centric v2 primary criterion was under-powered at 19 collision events at the pre-model support check; v3 broad interaction-failure composite + per-category + directional criterion is now current.
phase4_interaction_conditioned_prereg.thesis: IPV norm-deviation is a parsimonious socially meaningful official-harm monitor that should capture a predeclared fraction of the full physics ensemble signal; not incremental-over-physics, causal, planner-benefit, normative, or independent-from-physics.
phase4_interaction_conditioned_prereg.primary_endpoint: official_harm_flag = collision_flag_score0 OR collision_pdf_deduction > 0 OR safety_intervention > 0; no E02/E09 in primary

schemes.C: ROBUSTNESS causal E02/E09 active K=1 UNDER_IDENTIFIED

gate1_defaults.model: logistic GLM with scenario fixed effects; scenario random-intercept fallback
gate1_defaults.eff_gate: point estimate with mandatory CI reporting
gate1_defaults.denominator_rule: denominator negative, zero, nonfinite, or < tau_physics => UNDER_IDENTIFIED_MOOT_PHYSICS; no clamping
gate1_defaults.bootstrap: two-way team x scenario blocked wild bootstrap, B=10000, seed=20260625

phase4_interaction_conditioned_prereg.gate3_defaults: LOSO 14-train/1-holdout; pass 12/15 folds for direction and positive held-out skill; single-scenario influence <=40%
phase4_interaction_conditioned_prereg.scheme_endpoint_rule: automatic-event endpoints are descriptive-only where scheme conditioning overlaps; C/D x E02/E09 and A/B x E09 are not confirmatory

phase4_diagnostic_chain_headline: single-anchor 95.5% zero was a sampling artifact; interaction-conditioned signal recovered; parsimony reframe; |IPV|-closing r=0.535 to be handled by structure-preserving controls; v2 collision-centric primary under-powered at 19 collision events and criterion superseded by v3 broad interaction-failure composite + per-category + directional lock
next_gate: Current RQ011B run is closed out as PROVISIONAL_NULL / UNDER_IDENTIFIED and measurement-limited; future work should be a separate failure-segment retrieval/segmentation RQ before revisiting monitor validity.

resume_gates.description: RQ009 freezes M3 AND its decision explicitly clears downstream consumption after the M3-vs-M4 pivot (per B005 / Wave-B).
A locked statistical analysis plan + expanded denylist + operationalized negative controls + pre-registered falsifiable PASS/FAIL thresholds (B001-B004), PI-approved, re-reviewed.
